title: Carrick silences doubters as Man Utd close on Champions League
summary: Manchester United's victory over Chelsea moves them closer to Champions League qualification and quiets criticism of manager Michael Carrick. The performance validates Carrick's tactical approach during a crucial period of the season.

title: Heaven impresses amid Man Utd centre-back crisis
